title: Ethereal Mountain Landscape
prompt: Ethereal mountain landscape at golden hour, misty valleys between dramatic peaks, volumetric lighting through clouds, ultra realistic photography, 8k resolution, cinematic composition, warm golden tones with cool shadow contrast
negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, text, watermark, oversaturated

title: Neon Cyberpunk Alley
prompt: Narrow cyberpunk alley at night, neon signs in Japanese and English, wet reflections on pavement, steam rising from vents, holographic advertisements, blade runner atmosphere, ultra detailed, moody lighting

title: Portrait in Natural Light
prompt: Professional portrait photography, woman by window with soft natural light, shallow depth of field f/1.8, warm skin tones, authentic expression, studio quality, bokeh background, 85mm lens
negative_prompt: harsh lighting, artificial, plastic skin, oversmoothed

title: Fluid Abstract Art
prompt: Abstract fluid art, swirling colors of teal and coral, marble texture effect, high contrast, glossy finish, modern art style, 4k resolution, clean composition
negative_prompt: muddy colors, low contrast, pixelated, text

title: Minimal Product Photography
prompt: Minimalist product photography, luxury watch on clean white surface, soft directional lighting, subtle shadow, commercial quality, studio setup, sharp focus, neutral background
negative_prompt: cluttered background, harsh shadows, reflections, dust
